heading: Official residence expenses
label: 5913 Official residence expenses

Delegation of FunctionsSecretary of State empowered to prescribe regulations governing allotment to posts in foreign countries, for purpose stated in this section, of funds available to the departments for administrative expenses, and to designate senior officials of this Government in foreign countries, see section 1(c) of Ex. Ord. No. 10903, , 26 F.R. 217, set out as a note under .Jan. 11, 1961section 5921 of this title

children.label: a
children.text: For the purpose of this section, “agency” has the meaning given it by .section 5721 of this title
the chief representatives of the United States at the posts; and
such other senior officials of the Government of the United States as the President may designate.

children.label: c
children.text: Funds made available under subsection (b) may be provided in advance to persons eligible to receive reimbursements.
